Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems to be a vacant room.[n]The door is tightly sealed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The nameplate says, "Iori."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei doesn't seem to be in his room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei doesn't seem to be in his room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2112 0 0}What the hell is with this problem!? What language is this written in!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can hear Junpei yelling and shouting...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2112 0 0}Argh! What am I doing!? Dammit![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can hear Junpei yelling and shouting...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei seems to be in his room,[n]but he isn't responding...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2076 0 0}Dude, don't bother me. I'm tryna study here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't get good grades as easily as you do, man.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2099 0 0}What the hell is this problem!? We never learned this![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wait a minute... They must've taught us this when I was asleep! What a dirty trick![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can hear Junpei hollering...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, what're you doin'!? That way's obviously a trap![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you sure? But there's a treasure chest here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Whoa, a boss appeared! Junpei-kun, it's all yours![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei seems to be studying.[n]I shouldn't bother him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14019 0 0}Oh, is that you, Junpei-kun? Don't worry about getting me a drink or anything![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But anyway, I pressed a button and the whole screen suddenly went dark...[n]{f 1 1}
